title: Kind Of A Weird First Question
display_title: Kind Of A Weird First Question
wikitext:
[]: Kind Of A Weird First Question...             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Nov 12, 2009 4:45 am OMFG FINALLY SAW 2.0 TODAY! SURE IT WAS A CAMRIP, BUT WOW, IS UNIT 02'S BERSERK MODE GONNA GIVE ME NIGHTMARES! O_O Anyways, away from that deviation... I used to hate Kaworu (back when I was all like "Oh Evanjelion! Giant robutts, yeah!"). Now I think he's a pretty awesome feller (besides being Adam and all, and after a bellywash of EoE)... Has... anyone wanted to... uhhh... ... uhh... see what he's like inside; dissection? Okay, okay, creepy question, but I must KNOW IF HE'S GOT JUNK OR NOT! THAT BATH SCENE DIDN'T TELL ME NOTHING! Shinji WAS PROBABLY TOO EMO TO LOOK ANYWAYS >.< SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Nov 12, 2009 6:19 am Um... what now?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Thu Nov 12, 2009 6:25 am Kaworu's insides? "evanjelion"? rebuild? What are you on about, and what does rebuild have to do with this :p Someone direct him to the fem kaworu thread plx

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Nov 12, 2009 1:12 pm He has a Lilim body, meaning he's exactly like a human. If Kaworu didn't have any junk, Shinji probably would've thought to comment. I mean, come now, that's not something you dismiss easily.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Nov 12, 2009 1:42 pm Whether he has a schlong or not we will probably never see it drawn in detail in actual Evangelion material. There are some things that are too risque, even for Eva. Assume that he has one: why wouldn't he?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:18 pm Perhaps there isn't enough evidence in the series, however, I believe some doujinshi artists are positive they know the answer.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:22 pm Unlike Fem-Kaworu of NGE , Rebuild Kaworu is clearly a dude: I'd post Naw-kun's amusing edit but then I might risk temp-bannage or at least photo-bucket removal so I won't.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:41 pm Might you have that as a background my friend

[]:             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:51 pm Yes, but he was [in my presumptions from others] born from Adam during Second Impact, and conditioned by SEELE. So I tend to think he's a tad different from Rei and the (especially) Lilin just because of his origins. It's a strange curiosity, and I think femme Tabris's just... just not right :3 I also am aware it's not all that important, what with there being more interesting subjects >3

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:59 pm Femme Tabris is NOT Fem-Kaworu. Fem-Kaworu is a flat-chested girl while Tabby-chan is just Kaworu as a complete chick (don't ask about Fem-Kaworu, it's a result of epic craziness of Reichu).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:23 pm Kaworu as originally written in the drafts was unmistakably yaoi-fodder; the ambiguous framing in the as aired ep 24 (and in 24') left the question of "what did Shinji see in the bath house?" much more open to speculation in free-running brain mode -- did Kaworu have a core? was vis body pattern that of an Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by ColonelRudoji » Thu Nov 12, 2009 4:39 pm Femme Tabris is NOT Fem-Kaworu. Fem-Kaworu is a flat-chested girl while Tabby-chan is just Kaworu as a complete chick (don't ask about Fem-Kaworu, it's a result of epic craziness of Reichu).

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Nov 12, 2009 9:25 pm Well, if anything, Adam is actually a hermaphrodite. But either way, what does it matter? The body is not the soul, and souls don't really have gender.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Nov 13, 2009 4:49 pm Hate to go on a souls tangent, but then how could a soul have motherly feelings for its child?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 13, 2009 5:36 pm Is it left to me to say that Kaworu probably has vulvae in his palms?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 14, 2009 12:41 am Hate to go on a souls tangent, but then how could a soul have motherly feelings for its child?
